news.title: Celestica: Upgrading Before Q4 Earnings Despite Rich Valuation
news.summary: Celestica Inc. upgraded to Buy ahead of Q4 2025 earnings on AI infrastructure demand; see valuation, hyperscale growth, and key risks. Click for this CLS update.

news.title: Celestica Q4 Preview: Addressing Google Cloud Rumors (Rating Upgrade)
news.summary: Celestica targets 31% revenue growth for CY26 and $8.2 EPS with strong hyperscaler and AI networking demand. Find out why CLS stock is upgraded to buy.

news.title: Celestica Q4 Earnings Preview: Expect Another Double Beat (Upgrade)
news.summary: Celestica upgraded to Buy ahead of Q4 earnings on hyperscaler demand, Ethernet switch gains, and cooling TAM upside. Click for more on CLS stock.

news.title: Celestica: I Was Wrong - Buy Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
news.summary: Celesticaâs powerful operating leverage, leadership in the 1.6T networking cycle, and robust hyperscaler demand justify an upgrade to Buy. Learn more about CLS stock here.

news.title: Celestica: Execution Risks Loom As AI Optimism Gets Stress Tested
news.summary: Celestica has outperformed in the past year, alluding to a surge in AI-driven networking demand, but momentum has stalled since Q3 earnings. More on CLS stock.

news.title: Celestica: How It Escaped The Low-Margin Trap
news.summary: Celestica (CLS) shifts to integrated hardware+software with SONiC, boosting margins and ROIC. Read here for a detailed investment analysis.

news.title: Celestica Stock: Why Alphabet Looking Elsewhere Is Actually A Good Thing
news.summary: Celestica Inc. stock drops as Google reportedly seeks more TPU server suppliers, signaling rising TPU demand. Click here to read my latest analysis of CLS.

news.title: Celestica: When Engineering Becomes The Moat
news.summary: Celestica commands approximately 41% share in high-bandwidth Ethernet platforms and over 50% share in hyperscaler custom designs. Learn more about CLS stock here.
